📋 Request Processing & Responsibility
  • Requests are processed first in, first out based on warehouse capacity. Plan for a minimum 48-hour window from submission to pickup.
  • Requests with a pickup date inside 48 hours will be automatically marked ⚡ Urgent and may displace other pending work. Use sparingly.
  • The AWE Owner is responsible for communicating care and return expectations to any third-party recipient before items leave the warehouse —
    including what to do with damaged items, the return window, and the return shipping method.
  • The warehouse is not responsible for chasing returns or replacing lost items. Damaged or missing pieces are tracked against the requesting AWE Owner and the recipient.
  • Business-critical exceptions to the 48-hour rule require leadership approval.
